steps.title: Initial Conversation
steps.description: After you submit a request, we schedule a short, no-pressure conversation. No sales pitch — just an honest discussion to see if there's a genuine fit, for both sides.

steps.title: Discovery & Framework Design
steps.description: We study your brand, your existing assets, and your goals. From there, we design a framework specific to you — never a generic template borrowed from another client.

steps.title: Implementation
steps.description: We build and test the system together, refining as we go. You see real output early, not just a plan on paper.

steps.title: Handover & Ongoing Support
steps.description: Once the framework is working, we hand it over so you can run it independently. Ongoing support is available if you want it — never required.
